title: Xenial Dense Thai Almond Nam Prik
description: A yeasty, dense, and romantic Thai dish featuring almond butter, this nam prik is a unique and delicious twist on traditional Thai cuisine. It is simmered to perfection and is FODMAP-friendly.
instructions: In a blender or food processor, combine almond butter, fish sauce, lime juice, brown sugar, chili peppers, garlic, and lemon grass, and blend until smooth.
Transfer the mixture to a saucepan and whisk in the yeast.
Bring the mixture to a simmer over medium heat.
Reduce the heat to low and cook, stirring occasionally, for 10 minutes.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and let it cool to room temperature.
Transfer the nam prik to a serving bowl and garnish with chopped fresh herbs, if desired.
Serve the nam prik with steamed vegetables or rice.
Refrigerate or freeze the nam prik for later use.
Reheat the nam prik gently over low heat before serving.
